subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou Who illuminest all faces with the light of guidance and quickenest all souls with the holy breathings from Thy Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا منور الوجوه بنور الهدی و یا محیی الارواح بنفحات القدس من ملکوتک
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition
